items.name: emit_cargo_warnings
items.doc: Emit issues as `cargo:warning` lines (for build.rs integration).

items.name: write_issues_file
items.doc:
Write issues to `proj/ISSUES` with [NEW]/[KNOWN] delta markers.

Returns the number of new issues found.

items.name: format_grouped
items.doc:
Format issues as grouped output with guidance per group.

If `rules_root` is provided, loads decision trees from Rules/guidance/*.toml.

items.name: format_grouped_with_guidance
items.signature: pub fn format_grouped_with_guidance(issues: &[Issue], base: &Path, rules_root: Option<&Path>) -> String
items.doc: Format with optional guidance trees from Rules/guidance/.

items.name: should_deny
items.signature: pub fn should_deny(issues: &[Issue], deny: bool) -> bool
items.doc:
Check if build should be denied.
Critical issues always deny. Error issues deny when deny=true.
